creator: phoenix.simon@gmail.com
text:
Have not default value for $kqemu_enable in /usr/local/etc/rc.d/kqemu
Than -
"/etc/rc: WARNING: $kqemu_enable is not set properly - see rc.conf(5)."
while starting system.

Fix: - Fix default value $kqemu_enable in /usr/ports/emulators/kqemu-kmod/files/kqemu.in to "NO"


Patch attached with submission follows:
